{{nihongo|'''Kaminifukahano Shrine'''|新川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kaminifukahano Shrine'''|新川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kaminifukahano Shrine | native_name = 新川神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kaminifukahano Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kaminifukahano Shrine'''|新川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kaminifukahano Shrine'''|新川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kaminifukahano Shrine | native_name = 新川神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kaminifukahano Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kaminifukahano Shrine'''|新川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].
